title: spathelia vernicosa
intro: Spathelia vernicosa, also known as the Red Flower Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spathelia vernicosa include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
